comment.body:
market shows weakness at 6760,
i take one short, my target is 30 pts away. 
Can I take 10 pts stop-loss, if I expect 6790 to play out and give me 6760 at minimum? (my target is 6730)
I can, bcs I lose 10 pts, but win 30 if 6760 plays out.

if 6790 if broken, my target is 6805/10 to go short again.
Can I lose 10 pts if it can give me 15-20 pts at least? 
i can, I'm still above break even
